_comment: Author's local two-device cluster (single source of truth). Roles are assigned by the roofline, not by vibes: the GB10 ceiling is FP4 COMPUTE, so it owns the training step; the M3 Ultra has ~3x the memory bandwidth, so it owns token GENERATION (teacher farm + evals). Consumed by tools/model_backends.py role routing and the wisdom-internalization driver. Dependency-free config.

spark.machine: NVIDIA DGX Spark (GB10 Grace Blackwell, aarch64)
spark.notes: Compute-bound FP4 training node. 128GB unified (~273 GB/s LPDDR5x, NOT HBM). LoRA/QLoRA up to ~70B 4-bit; full fine-tune capped ~<=40B. Use the in-repo NVFP4 GEMM kernels (kernels/src/nvfp4_gemm.py) for the frozen base. inference.local.spark.json holds its serving topology.

mac.notes: Bandwidth-rich generation node. ~819 GB/s unified memory => faster per-token decode than the Spark. Runs the async teacher farm (gen_distill_traces), evals, and judge passes via MLX. 96GB fits a 4-30B teacher in 4-8bit; keep KV quantized (serving/kv_quant.py) for long context.
